title: DORBOKER Real Moving Gears Wall Clock Large Modern Metal Clocks for Living Room Decor,Industrial Steampunk Unique Vintage Decorative Clock for Home Farmhouse Office, 46cm/18 inch Red Copper Arabic
features: 🧭【Large Wall Clock with Unique Design】This modern wall clock is 18 inch, large cut out skeleton style, metal Arabic Numerals with aluminium dial and plating brushed copper gold finished, wheels in various different sizes are really turning in the central, clear HD tempered glass lens protects the clock face from dust, and keep it safe and away from broken, It's so COOL.

🧭【Exquisite Real Moving Gears】Industrial steampunk style wall clock, rose gold metal skeleton with golden gears gleaming in the central. When you put batteries in, various exposed steampunk cogs start rotating. The slight almost silent gears turning gives a quiet and peaceful feeling, definitely an eye-catching wall décor for your home or office.

🧭【Aesthetics Art Decor for Your Room】The beautiful gears clock in diameter 18 inch, depth 3 inch(46*7.8cm), perfect combination of modern Contemporary & industrial steampunk style, Fits most decor whether french country, rustic farmhouse, vintage traditional classic, shabby chic, Elegant Mid-century; Suitable for kitchen, dining, living room, fireplace, foyer, hallway, entry hallway,bar, restaurant, coffee house, office, studio, garage,covered outdoor garden and more!

🧭【Accurate Time and Easy to Read】The large industrial wall clock is using high quality quartz movement to run smoothly, ensuring accurate timing and absolute silence, no annoying ticking. Rustic clock has Big Dial with Digital numbers under HD clear toughened glass cover, easy to read from any angle.

🧭【Battery Operated, Easy to Use】 This steampunk cog wall clock arrives fully assembled, requires 1 AA battery for clock operation; 2 additional AA batteries for mechanical gears turning, Gears move independently of hands ,battery not included; Keyhole for hanging is in the back included for easy to install.
description: DORBOKER Wall clock with moving gears has a Modern, Industrial, Steampunk, Farmhouse, Unique style. MOVING GEAR: the Movement of the Gear makes the clock a living element in the environment in which it is placed. Great Wall Decor in any room. QUALITY: Made using high-grade materials to ensure the clock’s durability, the Rose Gold Metal leaves a rustic aspect. PERFECT FOR ALL ROOMS : DORBOKER big industrial vintage real gear clock is the perfect clock to dress up a wall in your kitchen, living room, bedroom, bathroom, family room, den, office...anywhere! Functional Home Décor DORBOKER clocks aren't just for timekeeping. They function as beautiful wall decor pieces, beyond telling time, and bring both style and purpose to any room. Requires three AA battery, and is easily hung on any wall. The clock is 18-inches (46cm)
